calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining and turn over order is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery & For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel answers to post judgment interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $336.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-20-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
